title: Escape Repulsorchute
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Escape_Repulsorchute.jpg|thumb]]

'''Escape Repulsorchutes''' were carried aboard [[Drone ore shuttle]]s. An archaic parachute, [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift engines]] were attached to the wings that acted as emergency escape equipment in atmospheric bailouts.

They were replaced with [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pods]] after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}
